name: Chocolate-Amaretto Cheesecake #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Use an 8-inch pan for this cheesecake recipe, if desired. The larger cheesecake requires only 45 to 50 minutes baking time.
2. Sprinkle chocolate wafer crumbs in the bottom of a 7-inch springform pan. Set aside.
3. In a food processor, process cream cheese and the next seven ingredients until smooth. Add egg and process just until blended. Fold in chocolate morsels.
4. Slowly pour mixture over crumbs in the pan. Bake at 300 degrees F. for 65 to 70 minutes or until cheesecake is set. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack. Cover and chill at least 8 hours.
5. Remove sides of pan and transfer cheesecake to a serving platter. Garnish with chocolate curls, if desired.
To make chocolate curls:
1. Melt 3 squares semisweet chocolate.
2. Pour melted chocolate onto wax paper and spread into a 3-inch wide strip. Let stand until cool but not firm.
3. Pull vegetable peeler across the chocolate and transfer curls to a plate. Store chocolate curls in the freezer.
